seoTitle: Cleland vs Cleve — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cleland and Cleve. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cleland and Cleve.
heading: Cleland vs Cleve — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cleland, South Australia and Cleve, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cleve has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cleland (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cleland or Cleve safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cleland has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Cleve scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cleland scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Cleve scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cleland or Cleve?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cleve has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
